title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS provides AI coding agents with curated AWS documentation, best practices, and tested procedures to improve success rates. It includes agent skills as markdown runbooks, MCP plugins, and integration patterns for Lambda and API Gateway deployment with built-in auditability through CloudTrail.
